_meta.description: OMNI-LEARN OS IRT自适应入学测试题库 · L11-L15 (A1 Entry)
_meta.instruction_language: bilingual — 主测题中英双语，确认题纯中文

design_notes.vs_L6_L10: L11+标志从Pre-A1到A1的关键跨越。四项核心变化：①指令升级为中英双语（主测题并列显示instruction_zh和instruction_en，确认题仍用纯中文降低认知负担）；②语法维度正式引入（10%权重），L11-12为句式选择(grammar_sentence_select)，L13-14为填空(grammar_gap_fill)，L15为找错(grammar_error_spot)；③词汇从Phonics解码型向语义理解型迁移，开始出现频率副词、连接词、情绪形容词；④听力和阅读从单句/短对话升级到3-5句连贯语篇，L14-15出现推断类题目
design_notes.grammar_dimension: 每级1道主测题+1道确认题，共10题。确认题回退到L9-10已隐式考查的结构（is/are/can），b≈-0.6到-1.1
design_notes.bilingual_rule: 主测题：instruction_zh与instruction_en双字段并列渲染。确认题：仅instruction_zh，避免在学生已失败状态下叠加语言负担
design_notes.confirm_difficulty: 确认题b≈-0.4到-1.1，比触发连错的级别低2级；L11需确认时跨库使用L6-10题库的L10确认题
design_notes.shortboard_rule: 综合等级不超过（最低维度等级+2）。任一维度比综合定级低超过2级，综合等级向下修正
design_notes.grammar_weight_note: 若语法维度得分比其余三维度低超过3级，语法成绩单独输出为「语法能力参考值」，不参与综合定级计算，避免因未接触语法而拉低综合分

adaptive_strategy.name: 2-wrong-1-confirm
adaptive_strategy.confirm_fallback: 确认题难度=当前级别-2（最低L11）。L11需确认→跨库使用L6-10题库L10确认题
adaptive_strategy.dimension_order: 词汇 → 听力 → 阅读 → 语法
adaptive_strategy.total_items_estimate: 13-18题（四维度）；置信度高的情况下可缩减至11-13题
flow: 1. 从问卷先验估计的区间中点开始
3. 连续答对2题同级别→该维度能力=当前级别，转下一维度
4. 连续答错2题→触发确认题（难度=当前级别-2）
5. 确认题答对→能力=确认题级别，终止该维度
6. 确认题答错→能力=确认题级别-1，终止该维度
7. 四维度全部终止→加权综合等级→应用短板保护规则→输出最终定级

item_types_new_in_L11_L15: grammar_sentence_select — 四选一选出语法正确句子（L11-12）
grammar_gap_fill — 句子填空选正确语法形式（L13-14）
grammar_error_spot — 找出错误句子并选出正确版本（L15）
inference_listening — 听短故事后做合理推断（L14-15）
conjunction_gap_fill — 选连接词填入句子/段落（L14-15词汇）
word_in_context — 根据语境推断画线词词义（L13-15词汇）

items.instruction_zh: 听一听，哪张图和你听到的一样？
items.instruction_en: Listen and choose the matching picture.
items.audio_content: She is reading a book.
media_required: audio_tts:She is reading a book.
items.skill_focus: 动作动词+性别辨识 — 现在进行时单句
items.distractor_logic: B=动作错(writing)，C=主语性别错(boy)，D=动作错(sleeping)。需同时听准she和reading

items.instruction_zh: 看图片，哪个词说的是这个？
items.instruction_en: Look at the picture. Which word matches?
media_required: img:tall_person_comparison
items.skill_focus: 形容词对比 — tall/short/long/small维度混淆
items.distractor_logic: short是反义词，long和tall在中文里都对应「长/高」的联想，small引起大小混淆

items.instruction_zh: 听一听，点一下你听到的动作
items.audio_content: running
media_required: audio_tts:running
items.skill_focus: 确认题 — 高频动作动词（难度≈L8-9）
items.distractor_logic: 四个动作视觉差异大，确认基本动词词汇下界

items.instruction_zh: 听一听，哪张图和你听到的一样？
items.instruction_en: Listen and choose the matching picture.
items.audio_content: The girl is eating a banana.
media_required: audio_tts:The girl is eating a banana.
items.skill_focus: 三要素句听力 — 主语+动作+宾语同时辨识
items.distractor_logic: B=宾语错(apple)，C=主语性别错(boy)，D=动作+宾语都错。三要素缺一即错

items.instruction_zh: 听一个问题，选最好的回答
items.instruction_en: Listen to the question. Choose the best answer.
items.audio_content: What color is the sky?
media_required: audio_tts:What color is the sky?
items.skill_focus: 疑问词理解 — What color，排除形状/大小/温度干扰答案
items.distractor_logic: B描述形状，C描述大小，D描述温度。需理解What color指向颜色属性而非其他

items.instruction_zh: 听一听，这个人让你做什么？
items.audio_content: Open your book, please.
media_required: audio_tts:Open your book, please.
items.skill_focus: 确认题 — 课堂指令open（难度≈L8-9）
items.distractor_logic: B是反义动作close，C/D是书的相关但不同动作

items.instruction_zh: 读一读这句话，哪张图和它说的一样？
items.instruction_en: Read the sentence. Choose the matching picture.
items.stimulus_sentence: The small cat is on the big box.
items.skill_focus: 含修饰语的句子阅读 — 形容词(small/big)+介词(on)四要素
items.distractor_logic: B=cat大小错，C=介词错(under)，D=动物种类错(dog)。需读准两个形容词和介词

items.instruction_zh: 下面四个词，哪个和其他三个不是一类？
items.instruction_en: Which word does NOT belong with the others?
items.skill_focus: 词类分类阅读 — 动词(-ing形式) vs 形容词，需解码后归类
items.distractor_logic: A/B/C均为动作动词-ing形式，D是情绪形容词。需具备解码能力+词性知识

items.instruction_zh: 读一读这句话，哪张图和它说的一样？
items.skill_focus: 确认题 — 简单SVO现在进行时句（难度≈L9-10）
items.distractor_logic: B=性别错，C/D=动作错，差异明显

items.instruction_zh: 哪一句话是正确的？
items.instruction_en: Which sentence is correct?

options.content: The cats is on the sofa.
The cats are on the sofa.
The cat are on the sofa.
The cats am on the sofa.

items.skill_focus: is/are主谓一致 — 复数名词用are
items.distractor_logic: A=复数名词+is（最常见错误），C=单数名词+are，D=cats+am（混淆人称）

items.instruction_zh: 哪一句话是正确的？
items.skill_focus: 确认题 — she/he + is（最基础主谓一致，难度≈L9）
items.distractor_logic: 二选一，仅测第三人称单数+is

items.instruction_zh: 听一听，哪张图和你听到的一样？
items.instruction_en: Listen and choose the matching picture.
items.audio_content: A bird can fly, but it cannot swim.
media_required: audio_tts:A bird can fly, but it cannot swim.
items.skill_focus: can/cannot对比 — but转折句，双信息（能/不能）同时提取
items.distractor_logic: B=只有swim，C=主语换成fish，D=两个动作都有（忽略了cannot）

items.instruction_zh: 看图片，哪个词说的是这个？
items.instruction_en: Look at the picture. Which word matches?
media_required: img:police_officer
items.skill_focus: 职业复合词 — police officer（两词组合）识别
items.distractor_logic: 全部为制服职业，需通过制服细节区分，且要识别两词短语

items.instruction_zh: 听一听，点一下你听到的东西
items.audio_content: doctor
media_required: audio_tts:doctor
items.skill_focus: 确认题 — 高频职业词汇（难度≈L9-10）
items.distractor_logic: 职业类别相同，但服装/背景视觉差异明显

items.instruction_zh: 听一段对话，回答问题
items.instruction_en: Listen to the dialogue. Answer the question.
items.audio_content: A: What do you like to do after school? B: I like swimming and reading books.
media_required: audio_tts_dialogue:What do you like to do after school? I like swimming and reading books.
items.skill_focus: 对话理解 — and连接的并列信息同时提取
items.distractor_logic: B/C各替换一个活动，D两个都替换。需同时记住swimming和reading两项

items.instruction_zh: 听一听，哪张图和你听到的一样？
items.instruction_en: Listen and choose the matching picture.
items.audio_content: There are three red apples on the table.
media_required: audio_tts:There are three red apples on the table.
items.skill_focus: 数量+颜色+位置三属性同时辨识
items.distractor_logic: B=数量错(two)，C=颜色错(green)，D=位置错(basket)。每个干扰项仅改一个属性

items.instruction_zh: 听一听，哪张图和你听到的一样？
items.audio_content: The dog is under the chair.
media_required: audio_tts:The dog is under the chair.
items.skill_focus: 确认题 — 介词+动物+家具（难度≈L9-10）
items.distractor_logic: B=介词错(on)，C=动物错(cat)，D=介词错(next to)

items.instruction_zh: 读一读，回答问题
items.instruction_en: Read and answer the question.
items.stimulus_text: Tom has a dog. The dog is black and white. Its name is Spot.
items.skill_focus: 2句段落阅读 — 提取颜色信息，and连接两个颜色
items.distractor_logic: B将black替换为brown，C/D只保留一个颜色。需读懂black and white整体

items.instruction_zh: 这个词缺了字母，看图片选正确的填入
items.instruction_en: Fill in the missing letters. Use the picture as a clue.
media_required: img:train
items.skill_focus: 元音组合Phonics — ai/ea/oi/ou区分（vowel digraphs）
items.distractor_logic: trean/troin/troun不是真实词或发音明显不同，需知道ai=/eɪ/对应train

items.instruction_zh: 读一读这句话，哪张图和它说的一样？
items.skill_focus: 确认题 — SVO现在进行时句子阅读（难度≈L9-10）
items.distractor_logic: B=主语性别错，C=动作+宾语错，D=宾语错

items.instruction_zh: 哪一句话是正确的？
items.instruction_en: Which sentence is correct?
items.skill_focus: 情态动词can — can后接动词原形，不加s/ing
items.distractor_logic: A=can后接三单flies，B=can加s，D=can后接ing。三种常见错误类型

items.instruction_zh: 哪一句话是正确的？
items.skill_focus: 确认题 — can+动词原形（最简形式，难度≈L9）
items.distractor_logic: 二选一，仅测can后是否错误加s

items.instruction_zh: 看句子，画线的词是什么意思？
items.instruction_en: Read the sentence. What does the underlined word mean?
items.skill_focus: 频率副词语义 — always/sometimes/never/quickly区分
items.distractor_logic: B/C是同类频率副词但语义相反，D是方式副词（混淆副词类别）

items.instruction_zh: 听一听，哪张图和你听到的一样？
items.instruction_en: Listen and choose the matching picture.
items.audio_content: The bank is next to the post office.
media_required: audio_tts:The bank is next to the post office.
items.skill_focus: 位置介词短语 — next to/in front of/behind + 建筑词汇组合
items.distractor_logic: B=介词错(in front of)，C=主体与参照物互换，D=介词错(behind)

items.instruction_zh: 听一听，哪张图和你听到的一样？
items.audio_content: The cat is next to the box.
media_required: audio_tts:The cat is next to the box.
items.skill_focus: 确认题 — next to介词（难度≈L10-11）
items.distractor_logic: 同一场景不同介词，视觉差异明显

items.instruction_zh: 听一小段故事，回答问题
items.instruction_en: Listen to the short story. Answer the question.
items.audio_content: Lucy wakes up at seven o'clock. She has breakfast with her family. Then she walks to school with her friend.
media_required: audio_tts:Lucy wakes up at seven o'clock. She has breakfast with her family. Then she walks to school with her friend.
items.skill_focus: 3句叙事听力 — 定位交通方式+陪同人物，排除family/friend混淆
items.distractor_logic: D是最有效干扰——混淆了with her family（吃早饭时）和with her friend（上学时）两个时间节点

items.instruction_zh: 听一段对话，回答问题
items.instruction_en: Listen to the dialogue. Answer the question.
items.audio_content: A: Who is that tall girl with long hair? B: That's my sister Amy. She's in Grade 5. A: She looks very friendly!

options.content: 高个子，长头发，看起来很友善
矮个子，短头发，看起来很友善
高个子，长头发，看起来很严肃
高个子，短头发，看起来很友善

media_required: audio_tts_dialogue:Who is that tall girl with long hair? That's my sister Amy. She's in Grade 5. She looks very friendly!
items.skill_focus: 3轮对话 — 整合三个描述信息（身高+发型+性格）
items.distractor_logic: B=身高+发型都错，C=性格错(serious)，D=发型错(short)。每个选项只改一个属性

items.instruction_zh: 听一小段话，回答问题
items.audio_content: Ben has a cat and a dog. He feeds them every morning.
media_required: audio_tts:Ben has a cat and a dog. He feeds them every morning.
items.skill_focus: 确认题 — 2句故事提取时间词（难度≈L11）
items.distractor_logic: 时间词morning/evening/noon/weekend差异明显，文中明确说morning

items.instruction_zh: 读一读，回答问题
items.instruction_en: Read and answer the question.
items.stimulus_text: Mia loves the park near her home. She goes there every Sunday with her dad. They like to feed the ducks by the lake.
items.skill_focus: 3句段落阅读 — 提取活动信息，by the lake是定语非谓语
items.distractor_logic: B把by the lake误读成in the lake，D增加了文中没有的游泳活动

items.instruction_zh: 读句子，画线的词最接近什么意思？
items.instruction_en: Read the sentences. What does the underlined word mean?
items.stimulus_sentence: My grandfather is __elderly__. He needs help walking.
items.skill_focus: 语境推断词义 — elderly结合第二句needs help walking推断
items.distractor_logic: B/C在没有语境时都可能描述grandfather，D完全不符合。需结合needs help walking推断elderly含义

items.instruction_zh: 读一读，回答问题
items.stimulus_text: Sam has a red bike. He rides it to school every day.
items.question_zh: Sam的自行车是什么颜色的？
items.skill_focus: 确认题 — 2句段落提取颜色信息（难度≈L11-12）
items.distractor_logic: 颜色选项差异明显，仅测能否找到red

items.instruction_zh: 选出正确的词填入空格
items.instruction_en: Choose the correct word to fill in the blank.
items.stimulus_sentence: Look! The children ___ in the park right now.
items.skill_focus: 现在进行时 — Look!+right now信号词触发be+Ving，复数主语用are
items.distractor_logic: A/B=一般现在时，D=进行时但be动词错用is（children是复数，需are）

items.instruction_zh: 选出正确的词填入空格
items.skill_focus: 确认题 — she+现在进行时is reading（难度≈L11-12语法）
items.distractor_logic: C=be动词用are（she是单数），A/D=一般现在时（忽略now信号词）

items.instruction_zh: 读句子，画线的词最接近什么意思？
items.instruction_en: Read the sentences. What does the underlined word mean?
items.stimulus_sentence: It was her first time on a plane. She felt very __nervous__ before take-off.
items.skill_focus: 情绪形容词语境推断 — nervous（first time + before take-off隐含紧张）
items.distractor_logic: B(excited)和A都可能是first time的情绪，需结合before take-off判断负面紧张感。C/D语境明显不符

items.instruction_zh: 选出正确的词填入空格，让句子说得通
items.instruction_en: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
items.stimulus_sentence: I wanted to go to the park, ___ it started raining.
items.skill_focus: 连接词语义 — but表转折（想去公园但下雨了，期望与结果相反）
items.distractor_logic: so表结果逻辑相反（下雨所以去公园？），and表并列无转折含义，because引导原因位置不对

items.instruction_zh: 读句子，画线的词是什么意思？
items.stimulus_sentence: She is __happy__ because she got a gift.
items.skill_focus: 确认题 — 高频情绪词happy，语境明确（难度≈L11-12）
items.distractor_logic: 均为情绪词，got a gift明确指向正面情绪，got a gift确认happy方向

items.instruction_zh: 听一段话，然后回答下面的问题
items.instruction_en: Listen and answer the question.
items.audio_content: Jake studies very hard every night. He always checks his homework twice before handing it in.
media_required: audio_tts:Jake studies very hard every night. He always checks his homework twice before handing it in.
items.skill_focus: 推断题 — 从行为描述推断性格特质（首次出现推断类听力）
items.distractor_logic: 文中没有直接说「认真」，需从studies hard + checks twice推断。B/C/D与所有行为描述明显矛盾

items.instruction_zh: 听一小段故事，回答问题
items.instruction_en: Listen to the story. Answer the question.
items.audio_content: Anna loves animals. She has two cats and one dog at home. Every weekend, she also helps at the animal shelter near her school.
items.question_zh: Anna除了在家养动物，还做什么跟动物有关的事？

options.content: 在学校附近的动物收容所帮忙

media_required: audio_tts:Anna loves animals. She has two cats and one dog at home. Every weekend, she also helps at the animal shelter near her school.
items.skill_focus: 4句叙事 — 区分「在学校」vs「学校附近」的位置精确性
items.distractor_logic: B把near her school误听为at school，是最有效干扰项。需理解shelter和near的含义

items.instruction_zh: 听一小段话，回答问题
items.audio_content: Mike likes football. He plays football with his friends every Saturday.
media_required: audio_tts:Mike likes football. He plays football with his friends every Saturday.
items.skill_focus: 确认题 — 2句故事提取时间信息（难度≈L12）
items.distractor_logic: B/C/D均为合理时间干扰，但文中明确说every Saturday

items.instruction_zh: 读一读，回答问题
items.instruction_en: Read and answer the question.
items.stimulus_text: My best friend is called Lily. She is kind and funny. She always helps me when I have problems. Last week, she helped me find my lost notebook.

options.content: 帮「我」找到了丢失的笔记本

items.skill_focus: 4句段落阅读 — 定位last week时间节点的具体事件
items.distractor_logic: B/D同样和notebook相关但动作不同（borrow/buy），C和帮助相关但对象不同（homework）

items.instruction_zh: 读一读，然后做推断
items.instruction_en: Read and make an inference.
items.stimulus_text: Every morning, David gets up early and runs for thirty minutes. He eats fruit and vegetables and never drinks soda. He goes to bed at nine o'clock every night.
items.question_zh: 根据这段话，David最可能是一个什么样的人？
items.skill_focus: 阅读推断 — 从runs/eats fruit/no soda/sleeps early多个细节综合推断人物特质
items.distractor_logic: 文中没有出现「健康」一词，需综合三句行为推断。B/C/D与任何一个细节都矛盾

items.instruction_zh: 读一读，回答问题
items.stimulus_text: Lisa has a cat. The cat is white and its name is Snow. Lisa loves Snow very much.
items.skill_focus: 确认题 — 3句段落提取专有名词（难度≈L12）
items.distractor_logic: B是主人名字，C是颜色词被误当作名字，D是迷惑性错误选项

items.instruction_zh: 选出正确的词填入空格
items.instruction_en: Choose the correct word to fill in the blank.
items.stimulus_sentence: My sister ___ two cats and one dog.
items.skill_focus: have/has主谓一致 — 第三人称单数my sister用has
items.distractor_logic: A=have（遗忘三单变化），C/D=be动词（混淆have和be的功能）

items.instruction_zh: 选出正确的词填入空格
items.skill_focus: 确认题 — I+have（第一人称用have，难度≈L12语法）
items.distractor_logic: B=has仅三单用，C/D=be动词混淆

items.instruction_zh: 选出最合适的词填入空格，让这段话说得通
items.instruction_en: Choose the best word to complete the passage.
items.stimulus_sentence: Jack was tired, ___ he went to bed early. The next morning, he felt much better.
items.skill_focus: 连接词语义 — so表结果（tired→went to bed），第二句felt better验证因果逻辑
items.distractor_logic: but表转折（tired但没去睡？逻辑矛盾），because引导原因从句位置不对，or表选择不适用此处

items.instruction_zh: 读句子，画线的词最接近什么意思？
items.instruction_en: Read the sentence. What does the underlined word mean?
items.stimulus_sentence: The museum has a __fascinating__ collection of ancient coins from around the world.

options.content: 非常有趣的，令人着迷的

items.skill_focus: 高级形容词语境推断 — fascinating（博物馆+收藏+来自世界各地隐含积极评价）
items.distractor_logic: B/C均可描述古代钱币，D语义与展览语境矛盾。需从整体语境判断评价色彩为正面

items.instruction_zh: 选出最合适的词填入空格
items.stimulus_sentence: I was hungry, ___ I ate a big lunch.
items.skill_focus: 确认题 — so表结果，语境简单直接（难度≈L13-14）
items.distractor_logic: hungry→ate big lunch因果关系明确且直接，so是唯一逻辑正确选项

items.instruction_zh: 听一段话，然后做出推断
items.instruction_en: Listen and make an inference.
items.audio_content: Clara looked at the dark clouds outside. She put on her coat and picked up her umbrella before leaving the house.
items.question_zh: Clara出门前为什么带了雨伞？

options.content: 她看到外面乌云密布，觉得要下雨
她忘记天气预报说晴天
雨伞是她每天必带的东西

media_required: audio_tts:Clara looked at the dark clouds outside. She put on her coat and picked up her umbrella before leaving the house.
items.skill_focus: 因果推断听力 — dark clouds→umbrella的隐含因果，文中未直接说will rain
items.distractor_logic: B混淆coat（因为冷）和umbrella（因为下雨）两个行为的不同原因，是最有效干扰项

items.instruction_zh: 听一段话，然后回答问题
items.instruction_en: Listen and answer the question.
items.audio_content: Oliver wanted to buy a present for his mother's birthday. He saved his pocket money for three weeks. On Saturday, he went to the shop and bought her a beautiful scarf. His mother was very surprised and happy.

options.content: 他存了三个星期的零花钱

media_required: audio_tts:Oliver wanted to buy a present for his mother's birthday. He saved his pocket money for three weeks. On Saturday, he went to the shop and bought her a beautiful scarf. His mother was very surprised and happy.
items.skill_focus: 4句叙事 — 提取手段/方式信息（saved pocket money for three weeks）
items.distractor_logic: B/C/D均是获取金钱的常见方式，但文中明确说saved his pocket money

items.instruction_zh: 听一段话，然后做出推断
items.audio_content: Tim didn't eat breakfast this morning. Now it's eleven o'clock and his stomach is making sounds.
items.question_zh: Tim现在最可能是什么感觉？
media_required: audio_tts:Tim didn't eat breakfast this morning. Now it's eleven o'clock and his stomach is making sounds.
items.skill_focus: 确认题 — 简单因果推断（没吃早饭+肚子叫→饿，难度≈L13）
items.distractor_logic: stomach making sounds是明确的饥饿信号，推断链条短且直接

items.instruction_zh: 读一读，回答问题
items.instruction_en: Read and answer the question.
items.stimulus_text: Every year, the students at Green Valley School take part in a Science Fair. This year, Emma and her partner Leo built a small working volcano. They used vinegar and baking soda to make it erupt. Their project won second place.
items.question_zh: Emma和Leo的项目获得了什么名次？
items.skill_focus: 4句段落阅读 — 提取结果信息(second place)，排除因描述精彩而推测first的倾向
items.distractor_logic: B是最大干扰项——学生可能因为working volcano描述精彩就猜第一名，但文中明确写second

items.instruction_zh: 读一读，然后做推断
items.instruction_en: Read and make an inference.
items.stimulus_text: Sophie always arrives at school ten minutes early. She finishes her homework the same day it is given. When her teacher asks a question, she is usually the first to raise her hand.
items.question_zh: 根据这段话，Sophie的老师最可能对她有什么看法？

options.content: 她是一个认真、积极的学生
她是一个经常迟到的学生
她是一个不喜欢回答问题的学生
她是一个成绩很差的学生

items.skill_focus: 多证据阅读推断 — 从三个行为（早到/当天完成作业/积极举手）综合推断老师评价
items.distractor_logic: B/C/D与文中三个证据全部矛盾。关键在于文中没有出现「认真」一词，需学生自己推断

items.instruction_zh: 读一读，回答问题
items.stimulus_text: Tom loves reading. He reads two books every month. His favourite books are about animals.
items.skill_focus: 确认题 — 3句段落提取偏好信息（难度≈L13）
items.distractor_logic: 文中明确说about animals，其他选项均为无关干扰

items.instruction_zh: 下面这句话有一个错误。选出正确的版本。
items.instruction_en: This sentence has a mistake. Choose the correct version.
items.skill_focus: 一般现在时否定句 — 第三人称单数she用doesn't，不用don't
items.distractor_logic: B=don't+三单likes（两个错误叠加），C=用is否定（混淆don't和isn't），D=缺少助动词

items.instruction_zh: 下面这句话有一个错误。选出正确的版本。
items.skill_focus: 确认题 — they+are现在进行时（复数be动词，难度≈L13语法）
items.distractor_logic: B/C/D均为错误版本，A是唯一正确的they+are+Ving结构
